//: MCP server definitions with ${ENV_VAR} placeholders, resolved from .env
at load time by runner/config.py. Each job selects only the servers it
needs (jobs/<name>/job.py), so unused connectors never block a run.
Remote (url) servers authenticate via OAuth: run `scripts/render-mcp-json.py`
then `claude` in this repo and use /mcp to complete each OAuth once — the
Claude Code binary caches the tokens and headless SDK runs reuse them.
gcal/gmail are `sdk` entries: in-process read-only tools served by
runner/google_tools.py over the plain REST APIs, authenticated with the
token scripts/google-oauth.py mints from your own OAuth desktop client.
were tried and return PERMISSION_DENIED to non-partner OAuth clients even
with correct scopes and the APIs enabled — don't re-attempt without new
evidence. `sdk` entries are skipped by scripts/render-mcp-json.py.
